parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Temu router request body. The `type` field must be `temu.local.goods.list.retrieve`.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: access_token
x-temu-common-parameters.description: A secure token for access control.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: timestamp
x-temu-common-parameters.description: The timestamp is in UNIX time format (seconds), with a length of 10 digits, and should be within a range of 300 seconds before the current time to 300 seconds after the current time.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: data_type
x-temu-common-parameters.description: The data format of the request response is fixed as JSON for optional parameters.

x-temu-common-parameters.name: version
x-temu-common-parameters.description: API version, defaults to V1, no need to pass this parameter if not required.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: pageSize
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Page size, indicating the number of records returned per page, with a limit of 100 per page, 25 per page

x-temu-request-parameters.name: pageToken
x-temu-request-parameters.description: The token used to fetch a specific page when there are multiple pages of results.

x-temu-request-parameters.name: orderField
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Attribute by which to sort the returned listing items. create_time for sorting by creation time

x-temu-request-parameters.name: orderType
x-temu-request-parameters.description: The order in which to sort the result items. 0 for descending order, 1 for ascending order. In descending order by default

x-temu-request-parameters.name: goodsSearchType
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Product status filter: ALL("ALL", "ALL = Active + InActive"), ACTIVE("ACTIVE", "Active"), INACTIVE("INACTIVE", "InActive"), INCOMPLETE("INCOMPLETE", "Incomplete"), DRAFT("DRAFT", "Draft"), DELETED("DELETED", "Deleted"),

x-temu-request-parameters.name: goodsIdList
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Product ID, supports batch limit of 100

x-temu-request-parameters.name: outGoodsSnList
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Out Goods Sn, supports batch limit of 100

x-temu-request-parameters.name: skuIdList
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Sku ID, supports batch limit of 200

x-temu-request-parameters.name: catIdList
x-temu-request-parameters.description: Category id for search limit of 100

x-temu-request-parameters.name: goodsName
x-temu-request-parameters.description: The title or name of the product

x-temu-request-parameters.name: goodsCreateTimeFrom
x-temu-request-parameters.description: A date and time that is used to filter listing product. The response includes product that were created at or after this time. Unix timestamp, unit: ms

x-temu-request-parameters.name: goodsCreateTimeTo
x-temu-request-parameters.description: A date and time that is used to filter listing product. The response includes product that were created at or before this time. Unix timestamp, unit: ms

x-temu-request-parameters.name: goodsStatusChangeTimeFrom
x-temu-request-parameters.description: A date and time that is used to filter listing product. The response includes status of product that were last updated at or after this time. Unix timestamp, unit: ms

x-temu-request-parameters.name: goodsStatusChangeTimeTo
x-temu-request-parameters.description: A date and time that is used to filter listing product. The response includes status of product that were last updated at or before this time. Unix timestamp, unit: ms

rows.Error Message: System error, please try again later

type.description: API name,eg:bg.* Must be `temu.local.goods.list.retrieve` for this operation.

access_token.description: A secure token for access control.

timestamp.description: The timestamp is in UNIX time format (seconds), with a length of 10 digits, and should be within a range of 300 seconds before the current time to 300 seconds after the current time.

data_type.description: The data format of the request response is fixed as JSON for optional parameters.

version.description: API version, defaults to V1, no need to pass this parameter if not required.

pageSize.description: Page size, indicating the number of records returned per page, with a limit of 100 per page, 25 per page

pageToken.description: The token used to fetch a specific page when there are multiple pages of results.

orderField.description: Attribute by which to sort the returned listing items. create_time for sorting by creation time

orderType.description: The order in which to sort the result items. 0 for descending order, 1 for ascending order. In descending order by default

goodsSearchType.description: Product status filter: ALL("ALL", "ALL = Active + InActive"), ACTIVE("ACTIVE", "Active"), INACTIVE("INACTIVE", "InActive"), INCOMPLETE("INCOMPLETE", "Incomplete"), DRAFT("DRAFT", "Draft"), DELETED("DELETED", "Deleted"),

goodsIdList.description: Product ID, supports batch limit of 100

outGoodsSnList.description: Out Goods Sn, supports batch limit of 100

skuIdList.description: Sku ID, supports batch limit of 200

catIdList.description: Category id for search limit of 100

goodsName.description: The title or name of the product

goodsCreateTimeFrom.description: A date and time that is used to filter listing product. The response includes product that were created at or after this time. Unix timestamp, unit: ms

goodsCreateTimeTo.description: A date and time that is used to filter listing product. The response includes product that were created at or before this time. Unix timestamp, unit: ms

goodsStatusChangeTimeFrom.description: A date and time that is used to filter listing product. The response includes status of product that were last updated at or after this time. Unix timestamp, unit: ms

goodsStatusChangeTimeTo.description: A date and time that is used to filter listing product. The response includes status of product that were last updated at or before this time. Unix timestamp, unit: ms
